name: Spicy Western Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 can (14 oz) whole tomatoes with liquid, chopped
1 can (16 oz) red kidney beans, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lentils and water in a pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 20 to 30 minutes.
2. Drain the lentils and reserve the liquid.
3. Fry the bacon strips until crispy. Remove from the fat and set aside.
4. In the remaining bacon fat, cook the onion until transparent.
5. Combine the drained lentils, cooked bacon, onion, ketchup, garlic powder, chili powder, ground cumin, dried red pepper flakes, and bay leaf in a Crock-Pot.
6. Stir in the chopped tomatoes and beans. Cook on High for 3 to 4 hours.
7. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
Serves 8 to 10
